ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the club belongs to */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club administrator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the club */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Primary contact number of the club */,
  "email" TEXT /* Primary email address of the club */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the club */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the club is currently active */,
  "membership_count" INTEGER /* Current number of members in the club */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the club was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clubs_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clubs_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club undertaking the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "funds_required" REAL /* Amount of funds required for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Good, Poor) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "funds_raised" REAL /* Total amount of funds raised for the project */,
  "funds_spent" REAL /* Total amount of funds spent on the project */,
  "project_leader" INTEGER /* ID of the project leader */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Indicates the completion status of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_leader FOREIGN KEY ("project_leader") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the district belongs to */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person for the district */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Primary contact number of the district */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the district is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Primary contact number of the administrator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_dues" (
  "dues_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the dues record */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club that paid the dues */,
  "dues_paid" TEXT /* Indicates if the dues have been paid (Yes/No) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the dues were paid */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount of dues paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Online, Check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dues_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_district_dues_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "md_dues" (
  "md_dues_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the membership development dues record */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club that paid the dues */,
  "dues_paid" TEXT /* Indicates if the dues have been paid (Yes/No) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the dues were paid */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount of dues paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Online, Check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("md_dues_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_md_dues_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "international_dues" (
  "int_dues_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the international dues record */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club that paid the dues */,
  "dues_paid" TEXT /* Indicates if the dues have been paid (Yes/No) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the dues were paid */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount of dues paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Online, Check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("int_dues_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_international_dues_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the fund */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funds raised or spent */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of funds (e.g., donation, club contribution) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the funds were received or spent */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Received, Spent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funds_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club that held the meeting */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the meeting */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the meeting */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the meeting */,
  "agenda" TEXT /* Agenda of the meeting */,
  "attendees" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "minutes" TEXT /* Minutes of the meeting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club hosting the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "attendees" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the event */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club to which the member belongs */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Full name of the member */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the member joined the club */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the member */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Primary contact number of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Indicates the current membership status */,
  "last_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last dues payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_roles" (
  "member_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member role record */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member assigned to the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the member */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the member started in the role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the member ended the role */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the member is currently active in the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_roles_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
